project.name: BrokerApp — AI-Powered Property Ad Generator
project.description:
## Goal
Build a fully functional frontend SaaS application for Dutch real estate brokers that transforms property photos into publish-ready advertisements using AI. The complete user flow: authenticate → view dashboard → upload photos & property details → generate AI advert → review/edit in platform-specific preview → export.

## Technical Spec Reference
`.planning/broker-app/technical-spec.md`

## Architecture Context
- **Pattern**: Next.js 15 App Router with route groups for auth vs app layouts
- **Key directories**: `src/app/(auth)/`, `src/app/(app)/`, `src/components/`, `src/lib/`, `src/hooks/`
- **Test strategy**: Manual testing only for this frontend-only phase (no automated tests)

## Milestones

### 1. Foundation
Project scaffolding, design system tokens, type definitions, and mock data layer.

### 2. Shell & Auth
Authentication pages and the app shell (sidebar navigation, page header).

### 3. Core Features
Dashboard, upload & generate page, and the signature advert editor with platform preview.

## Required MCP Tools
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__*` — issue tracking
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__*` — shadcn/ui component installation
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__*` — Next.js, Tailwind CSS, React documentation

## Out of Scope
- Backend API / database / authentication logic
- Real AI integration (OpenAI, Claude, etc.)
- Real image upload to cloud storage
- Real platform API integration (Funda API, etc.)
- Payment / subscription management
- Multi-language support (Dutch only)
- Automated testing (deferred to backend integration phase)
- Dark mode
- Mobile native app

## Completion Criteria
- [ ] All issues resolved and PRs merged
- [ ] `npm run dev` starts the full app without errors
- [ ] Complete user flow works: login → dashboard → upload → generate → edit → export
- [ ] All UI text is in Dutch
- [ ] Design system tokens (Plus Jakarta Sans, terracotta brand, warm surfaces) applied consistently
- [ ] Platform preview shows distinct styling for Funda, Pararius, and Jaap

milestones.name: Phase 1: Foundation
milestones.description: Project scaffolding, design system tokens, type definitions, and mock data layer. These have no dependencies and establish the foundation for all subsequent work.

milestones.name: Phase 2: Shell & Auth
milestones.description: Authentication pages (login, registration) and the app shell (sidebar navigation, page header). Depends on Phase 1 for project setup and mock data.

milestones.name: Phase 3: Core Features
milestones.description: Dashboard, upload & generate page, and the signature advert editor with platform preview. Depends on Phase 2 for the app shell.

issues.title: [Foundation] Scaffold Next.js project with design system
issues.description:
## Summary
Initialize the Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, configure Tailwind CSS 4 with the BrokerApp design system tokens, install shadcn/ui with a custom theme, and set up the foundational project structure. This enables all subsequent issues to build on a consistent, token-driven UI foundation.

## Current vs Expected Behavior
**Current:** No project exists — greenfield.
**Expected:** A working Next.js 15 app with Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, Plus Jakarta Sans font, design system CSS variables, and path aliases. `npm run dev` starts without errors.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `npm run dev` starts without errors and renders the root page which redirects to `/dashboard`
- [ ] Design tokens from `.interface-design/system.md` are available as CSS custom properties (colors, spacing, shadows, radii) and Plus Jakarta Sans renders as the default font
- [ ] shadcn/ui components (Button, Input, Card, Tabs, Badge, Avatar, Textarea, Label, Separator) are installed and render with the custom terracotta brand theme

## Scope
**In scope:** Project initialization, Tailwind config with design tokens, shadcn/ui setup, font configuration, root layout, root redirect page, globals.css with CSS variables, tsconfig path aliases
**Out of scope:** Any page content, components, mock data, auth pages, app shell

## Technical Context

### Files to Modify
| File | Action | What to Change |
|------|--------|----------------|
| `package.json` | Create | Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge |
| `next.config.ts` | Create | Default App Router configuration |
| `tsconfig.json` | Create | Strict mode, path aliases (`@/` → `src/`) |
| `tailwind.config.ts` | Create | Design tokens as CSS variables, Plus Jakarta Sans font family |
| `src/app/globals.css` | Create | Tailwind imports + all CSS custom properties from design system (colors, spacing, shadows, radii) |
| `src/app/layout.tsx` | Create | Root layout with `lang="nl"`, Plus Jakarta Sans via `next/font/google`, metadata |
| `src/app/page.tsx` | Create | Redirect to `/dashboard` using `redirect()` |
| `src/lib/utils.ts` | Create | shadcn/ui `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge) |
| `src/components/ui/*` | Create | shadcn/ui component files installed via CLI |

### Patterns to Follow
- App Router route groups for auth vs app layouts (establish `(auth)` and `(app)` group directories)
- Server components by default, `"use client"` only where needed
- CSS custom properties for all design tokens (not Tailwind config values)

### Reusable Utilities
- `src/lib/utils.ts` — `cn()` function for conditional class merging (installed by shadcn/ui)

### Related Tests
No automated tests for this phase.

### Design Context
- **system.md**: EXISTS at `.interface-design/system.md`
- **Depth strategy**: subtle-shadows
- **Key tokens**: 4px spacing base, 6/10/16px radius scale, terracotta `#D97756` brand, warm canvas `#FAF9F7`
- **Component patterns to match**: N/A (foundation only)

The resolver MUST read `.interface-design/system.md` and translate ALL tokens into CSS custom properties in `globals.css`.

### Implementation Complexity
**Estimate:** M
- 7+ files including shadcn/ui components, some configuration decisions needed

### Scope Files
**Must modify:** `package.json`, `next.config.ts`, `tsconfig.json`, `tailwind.config.ts`, `src/app/globals.css`, `src/app/layout.tsx`, `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/lib/utils.ts`, `src/components/ui/*`
**Must NOT modify:** `src/lib/types.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/mock-data.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/mock-ai.ts` (Issue 2)

### Required Tools
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__search_items_in_registries` — find shadcn/ui components to install
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__get_add_command_for_items` — get install commands for components
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__resolve-library-id` — resolve Next.js, Tailwind CSS docs
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__query-docs` — query framework documentation
- `gh pr create` — create pull request
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__create_comment` — update issue status

### Test Scenarios
1. **Dev server starts**: Run `npm run dev` → app starts on localhost without errors
2. **Font rendering**: Navigate to any page → Plus Jakarta Sans is applied to all text
3. **CSS variables available**: Inspect computed styles → all design tokens present as CSS custom properties
4. **shadcn/ui themed**: Render a Button component → uses terracotta brand color, not default shadcn blue
5. **Root redirect**: Navigate to `/` → redirected to `/dashboard`

### Implementation Notes
- **Do NOT** refactor or restructure existing code beyond what's needed for this issue
- **Do NOT** add error handling, validation, or edge cases not specified in the AC
- **Do NOT** modify files outside the Scope Files list
- **Pattern rationale**: CSS custom properties allow runtime theming and keep Tailwind config clean
- **Key constraints**: Must use Tailwind CSS 4 (not 3) — uses `@tailwindcss/postcss` plugin, CSS-first config. Must use `next/font/google` for Plus Jakarta Sans (not @fontsource)
- **Per-file acceptance**: `globals.css` must contain ALL tokens from system.md. `layout.tsx` must set `lang="nl"` and apply font. `page.tsx` must redirect to `/dashboard`.

issues.title: [Foundation] Create type definitions and mock data layer
issues.description:
## Summary
Create the TypeScript type definitions, mock property data with realistic Dutch addresses, and a simulated AI generation function. This data layer powers the entire frontend — dashboard stats, property cards, activity feed, and advert generation.

## Current vs Expected Behavior
**Current:** No types or data exist.
**Expected:** Typed interfaces for all domain objects, 6-8 mock Dutch properties with varied statuses, dashboard stats, activity feed items, and a mock AI function that returns realistic Dutch adverts after a 2-3 second delay.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All TypeScript interfaces compile without errors and cover: `Property`, `Advert`, `Platform` (enum), `PropertyStatus` (enum), `DashboardStats`, `ActivityItem`
- [ ] Mock data includes 6-8 properties with realistic Dutch addresses (Amsterdam, Utrecht, Rotterdam, Den Haag), EUR prices (€250.000–€850.000), all three statuses (draft, generated, published), and 10+ activity feed items
- [ ] `generateAdvert(property)` returns a realistic Dutch advert after a 2-3 second simulated delay, selecting from at least 3 distinct advert templates based on property characteristics

## Scope
**In scope:** Type definitions, mock property data, mock dashboard stats, mock activity feed, mock AI generation function with Dutch advert templates
**Out of scope:** React hooks (Issue 5, 6), UI components, real API calls

## Technical Context

### Files to Modify
| File | Action | What to Change |
|------|--------|----------------|
| `src/lib/types.ts` | Create | All domain TypeScript interfaces and enums |
| `src/lib/mock-data.ts` | Create | Mock properties, dashboard stats, activity feed items, pre-generated adverts |
| `src/lib/mock-ai.ts` | Create | `generateAdvert()` function with delay simulation and Dutch advert templates |

### Patterns to Follow
- Mock data service layer: importable functions that return typed data
- Enums for fixed sets (Platform, PropertyStatus)
- Realistic Dutch content: street names (Keizersgracht, Oudegracht), cities, postal codes (1015 AB format), EUR formatting

### Reusable Utilities
- `src/lib/types.ts` — all other issues import types from here
- `src/lib/mock-data.ts` — Issues 4, 5 import mock properties and stats
- `src/lib/mock-ai.ts` — Issue 6 imports the generation function

### Related Tests
No automated tests for this phase.

### Design Context
- **system.md**: EXISTS at `.interface-design/system.md`
- **Depth strategy**: N/A (data-only issue)
- **Key tokens**: N/A
- **Component patterns to match**: N/A

### Implementation Complexity
**Estimate:** S
- 3 files, straightforward data definitions

### Scope Files
**Must modify:** `src/lib/types.ts`, `src/lib/mock-data.ts`, `src/lib/mock-ai.ts`
**Must NOT modify:** `src/app/*` (Issues 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7), `src/components/*` (Issues 3–7), `src/hooks/*` (Issues 5, 6)

### Required Tools
- `gh pr create` — create pull request
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__create_comment` — update issue status

### Test Scenarios
1. **Types compile**: Import all types in a test file → no TypeScript errors
2. **Mock data coverage**: `mockProperties` array includes draft, generated, and published statuses
3. **Dutch addresses**: Properties have Dutch street names, cities, and postal codes in correct format
4. **AI generation delay**: `generateAdvert(property)` resolves after ~2-3 seconds with a complete Advert object
5. **Template variety**: Calling `generateAdvert` with different property types returns distinct descriptions

### Implementation Notes
- **Do NOT** refactor or restructure existing code beyond what's needed for this issue
- **Do NOT** add error handling, validation, or edge cases not specified in the AC
- **Do NOT** modify files outside the Scope Files list
- **Key constraints**: Prices should be in whole euros (Dutch format: €425.000 not €425,000). Energy labels range from A+++ to G. Square meters as integers. Activity timestamps should be recent (within past week) for realistic relative time display.
- **Per-file acceptance**: `types.ts` must export all interfaces/enums. `mock-data.ts` must export `mockProperties`, `mockDashboardStats`, `mockActivityFeed`, `mockAdverts`. `mock-ai.ts` must export `generateAdvert` with configurable delay.

issues.title: [Shell] Build auth pages (login & registration)
issues.description:
## Summary
Build the authentication pages (login and registration) with a centered auth layout. Both pages use Dutch labels, apply the BrokerApp design system, and redirect to `/dashboard` on submit (mocked, no real auth).

## Current vs Expected Behavior
**Current:** No auth pages exist.
**Expected:** `/login` shows a Dutch login form (email, password, Google sign-in). `/registreren` shows a Dutch registration form (name, email, password, company). Both redirect to `/dashboard` on submit.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `/login` renders a centered form with email/password inputs, "Inloggen" button in brand terracotta, "Inloggen met Google" button, and links to forgot password and registration — form submit redirects to `/dashboard`
- [ ] `/registreren` renders a centered form with name, email, password, and company name fields, "Account aanmaken" button, and link to login — form submit redirects to `/dashboard`
- [ ] Both pages use the auth layout (centered, no sidebar, warm canvas background, brand mark above form) and are responsive (full-width form on mobile)

## Scope
**In scope:** Auth layout, login page, registration page, Dutch labels, design system styling, mocked form submission
**Out of scope:** Real authentication, password validation, email verification, forgot password flow, session management

## Technical Context

### Files to Modify
| File | Action | What to Change |
|------|--------|----------------|
| `src/app/(auth)/layout.tsx` | Create | Centered layout with warm canvas background, brand mark centered above form |
| `src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` | Create | Login form with email, password, Google sign-in button, links |
| `src/app/(auth)/registreren/page.tsx` | Create | Registration form with name, email, password, company fields |

### Patterns to Follow
- `"use client"` for form interaction (submit handler with `router.push`)
- shadcn/ui Input, Button, Label components
- Design system tokens for all styling (no hardcoded colors)

### Reusable Utilities
- `src/lib/utils.ts` — `cn()` for class merging
- shadcn/ui components: `Button`, `Input`, `Label`, `Card`

### Related Tests
No automated tests for this phase.

### Design Context
- **system.md**: EXISTS at `.interface-design/system.md`
- **Depth strategy**: subtle-shadows
- **Key tokens**: `--canvas` (#FAF9F7) background, `--brand` (#D97756) for primary buttons, `--border-focus` for focus rings, `--radius-sm` for inputs
- **Component patterns to match**: None specific — auth pages are standalone centered forms

The resolver MUST read `.interface-design/system.md` and apply its tokens.

### Implementation Complexity
**Estimate:** S
- 3 files, straightforward form pages

### Scope Files
**Must modify:** `src/app/(auth)/layout.tsx`, `src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/(auth)/registreren/page.tsx`
**Must NOT modify:** `src/app/(app)/*` (Issues 4–7), `src/components/*` (Issues 4–7), `src/lib/types.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/mock-data.ts` (Issue 2), `src/hooks/*` (Issues 5, 6)

### Required Tools
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__search_items_in_registries` — verify shadcn/ui component availability
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__resolve-library-id` — Next.js App Router docs
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__query-docs` — query routing/navigation docs
- `gh pr create` — create pull request
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__create_comment` — update issue status

### Test Scenarios
1. **Login renders**: Navigate to `/login` → form with email, password, buttons, and links visible
2. **Registration renders**: Navigate to `/registreren` → form with all 4 fields and button visible
3. **Login redirect**: Fill login form, click "Inloggen" → redirected to `/dashboard`
4. **Registration redirect**: Fill registration form, click "Account aanmaken" → redirected to `/dashboard`
5. **Responsive layout**: Resize to mobile → form centers and stretches to full width
6. **Focus states**: Tab through inputs → terracotta focus ring appears on each

### Implementation Notes
- **Do NOT** refactor or restructure existing code beyond what's needed for this issue
- **Do NOT** add error handling, validation, or edge cases not specified in the AC
- **Do NOT** modify files outside the Scope Files list
- **Key constraints**: All text must be in Dutch. Google sign-in button is visual only (no OAuth). Forms do not validate — any input redirects to `/dashboard`. Use `useRouter().push('/dashboard')` for redirect.
- **Per-file acceptance**: `layout.tsx` must center content on `--canvas` bg with brand mark. `login/page.tsx` must have all specified inputs and buttons. `registreren/page.tsx` must have all 4 fields.
blocked_by_titles: [Foundation] Scaffold Next.js project with design system

issues.title: [Shell] Build app shell with sidebar and page header
issues.description:
## Summary
Build the app shell that wraps all authenticated pages: a sidebar with navigation links and recent properties, plus a reusable page header component. The sidebar uses the same canvas background as the main content (not a different color) and collapses on mobile.

## Current vs Expected Behavior
**Current:** No app shell exists.
**Expected:** All `(app)` routes render inside a layout with a fixed-width sidebar (logo, nav links, recent properties, user avatar) and a scrollable main content area with a reusable page header.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sidebar renders with brand mark at top, navigation links (Dashboard with LayoutDashboard icon, "Nieuwe advertentie" with Plus icon), "Recente woningen" section showing 3 recent property addresses from mock data, and user avatar + "Jan de Vries" at bottom
- [ ] Active navigation link shows `--brand-subtle` background with `--brand` text color, hover shows `--surface-2` background, and sidebar uses `--canvas` background with `--border` right edge separation
- [ ] Layout is responsive — sidebar collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile, and page header renders title with display typography and optional action button slot

## Scope
**In scope:** App layout with sidebar + main area, sidebar component, page header component, responsive collapse, mock user data
**Out of scope:** Dashboard content (Issue 5), actual page content, authentication state management

## Technical Context

### Files to Modify
| File | Action | What to Change |
|------|--------|----------------|
| `src/app/(app)/layout.tsx` | Create | Flexbox layout: sidebar (fixed width) + scrollable main content area |
| `src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx` | Create | Navigation sidebar with logo, links, recent properties, user avatar |
| `src/components/layout/header.tsx` | Create | Page header with title, optional breadcrumbs, optional action button |

### Patterns to Follow
- Navigation Sidebar pattern from `.interface-design/system.md`: same `--canvas` background, `--border` right edge, `--brand-subtle` active state
- Server component for layout, client component for sidebar (mobile toggle state)
- Import mock properties from `src/lib/mock-data.ts` for recent properties section

### Reusable Utilities
- `src/lib/mock-data.ts` — import `mockProperties` for recent properties in sidebar
- `src/lib/types.ts` — `Property` type for typing
- `src/lib/utils.ts` — `cn()` for class merging
- shadcn/ui components: `Button`, `Avatar`, `Separator`
- `lucide-react` — `LayoutDashboard`, `Plus`, `Menu`, `X` icons

### Related Tests
No automated tests for this phase.

### Design Context
- **system.md**: EXISTS at `.interface-design/system.md`
- **Depth strategy**: subtle-shadows
- **Key tokens**: `--canvas` for sidebar bg, `--border` for right edge, `--brand-subtle` + `--brand` for active nav, `--surface-2` for hover, Display 30px/700 for page titles
- **Component patterns to match**: Navigation Sidebar pattern from system.md

The resolver MUST read `.interface-design/system.md` and apply the Navigation Sidebar pattern exactly.

### Implementation Complexity
**Estimate:** S
- 3 files, but sidebar has moderate interaction (responsive collapse)

### Scope Files
**Must modify:** `src/app/(app)/layout.tsx`, `src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx`, `src/components/layout/header.tsx`
**Must NOT modify:** `src/app/(auth)/*` (Issue 3), `src/app/(app)/dashboard/*` (Issue 5), `src/app/(app)/nieuw/*` (Issue 6), `src/app/(app)/advertentie/*` (Issue 7), `src/lib/types.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/mock-data.ts` (Issue 2), `src/hooks/*` (Issues 5, 6)

### Required Tools
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__search_items_in_registries` — verify shadcn/ui component availability
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__resolve-library-id` — Next.js layout docs
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__query-docs` — query App Router layout patterns
- `gh pr create` — create pull request
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__create_comment` — update issue status

### Test Scenarios
1. **Sidebar renders**: Navigate to any app route → sidebar visible with logo, nav links, recent properties, user avatar
2. **Active state**: Navigate to `/dashboard` → Dashboard link shows brand-subtle background and brand text
3. **Recent properties**: Sidebar shows 3 property addresses from mock data
4. **Mobile collapse**: Resize to mobile → sidebar hidden, hamburger menu visible, clicking it opens sidebar overlay
5. **Page header**: Dashboard page shows title in display typography (30px, 700 weight)
6. **Navigation works**: Click "Nieuwe advertentie" in sidebar → navigates to `/nieuw`

### Implementation Notes
- **Do NOT** refactor or restructure existing code beyond what's needed for this issue
- **Do NOT** add error handling, validation, or edge cases not specified in the AC
- **Do NOT** modify files outside the Scope Files list
- **Pattern rationale**: Same-background sidebar (not contrasting) per design system — separation via border only
- **Key constraints**: User data is hardcoded ("Jan de Vries", mock avatar). Recent properties come from importing `mockProperties` and slicing the first 3. Sidebar width ~256px on desktop.
- **Per-file acceptance**: `layout.tsx` must render sidebar + main in flexbox. `sidebar.tsx` must include all 5 sections (logo, nav, recent, separator, user). `header.tsx` must accept title and optional action props.

issues.title: [Features] Build rich dashboard page
issues.description:
## Summary
Build the main dashboard page with stat cards showing key metrics, a responsive grid of photo-forward property cards, and an activity feed with Dutch relative timestamps. This is the landing page after login and the hub for accessing all properties.

## Current vs Expected Behavior
**Current:** No dashboard page exists.
**Expected:** `/dashboard` shows a stats row (4 cards with trends), a responsive property card grid (photo-forward with status badges), and an activity feed with Dutch relative timestamps.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Stats row shows 4 stat cards ("Totaal woningen", "Gegenereerd deze maand", "Gepubliceerd", "Gem. generatietijd") with large display numbers, trend indicators (up/down arrow + percentage in success/destructive color), and icons in `--brand-subtle` containers
- [ ] Property grid shows photo-forward cards (image ~60% height, status badge pill, address, price as "€ 425.000", stats row) with correct badge colors per status (Draft=`--ink-tertiary`, Gegenereerd=`--warning`, Gepubliceerd=`--success`), hover lift effect, and responsive columns (3→2→1)
- [ ] Activity feed shows recent actions ("Advertentie gegenereerd", "Advertentie bewerkt", "Gepubliceerd op Funda") with Dutch relative timestamps ("2 uur geleden", "gisteren"), and clicking a property card navigates to `/advertentie/[id]` (generated/published) or `/nieuw` (draft)

## Scope
**In scope:** Dashboard page, stat card component, property card component, activity feed component, properties hook, Dutch formatting
**Out of scope:** Property CRUD operations, filtering/sorting, search, pagination

## Technical Context

### Files to Modify
| File | Action | What to Change |
|------|--------|----------------|
| `src/app/(app)/dashboard/page.tsx` | Create | Dashboard page with stats row, property grid, activity feed sections |
| `src/components/dashboard/stat-card.tsx` | Create | Stat card with large number, trend, label, icon |
| `src/components/dashboard/property-card.tsx` | Create | Photo-forward property card with image, badge, details |
| `src/components/dashboard/activity-feed.tsx` | Create | Activity feed list with icons, descriptions, timestamps |
| `src/hooks/use-properties.ts` | Create | Hook returning mock properties with filter-by-status capability |

### Patterns to Follow
- Property Card (Photo-Forward) pattern from `.interface-design/system.md`
- Stat Card pattern from `.interface-design/system.md`
- `"use client"` for interactive components (property card click, hook state)
- Import data from `src/lib/mock-data.ts`

### Reusable Utilities
- `src/lib/mock-data.ts` — `mockProperties`, `mockDashboardStats`, `mockActivityFeed`
- `src/lib/types.ts` — `Property`, `DashboardStats`, `ActivityItem`, `PropertyStatus`
- `src/lib/utils.ts` — `cn()` for class merging
- `src/components/layout/header.tsx` — page header component from Issue 4
- shadcn/ui components: `Card`, `Badge`
- `lucide-react` — stat icons, activity type icons, trend arrows

### Related Tests
No automated tests for this phase.

### Design Context
- **system.md**: EXISTS at `.interface-design/system.md`
- **Depth strategy**: subtle-shadows (card shadow for property cards and stat cards)
- **Key tokens**: `--surface-1` for cards, `--brand-subtle` for icon containers, `--success`/`--warning`/`--ink-tertiary` for status badges, Display 30px/700 for stat numbers, card shadow values
- **Component patterns to match**: Property Card (Photo-Forward), Stat Card from system.md

The resolver MUST read `.interface-design/system.md` and implement the Property Card and Stat Card patterns exactly.

### Implementation Complexity
**Estimate:** M
- 5 files, multiple component patterns, responsive grid layout

### Scope Files
**Must modify:** `src/app/(app)/dashboard/page.tsx`, `src/components/dashboard/stat-card.tsx`, `src/components/dashboard/property-card.tsx`, `src/components/dashboard/activity-feed.tsx`, `src/hooks/use-properties.ts`
**Must NOT modify:** `src/lib/mock-data.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/types.ts` (Issue 2), `src/components/layout/*` (Issue 4), `src/app/(app)/nieuw/*` (Issue 6), `src/app/(app)/advertentie/*` (Issue 7), `src/components/upload/*` (Issue 6), `src/components/editor/*` (Issue 7)

### Required Tools
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__search_items_in_registries` — verify Card, Badge availability
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__resolve-library-id` — Next.js, React docs
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__query-docs` — query Next.js Link/navigation
- `gh pr create` — create pull request
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__create_comment` — update issue status

### Test Scenarios
1. **Stats render**: Navigate to `/dashboard` → 4 stat cards visible with numbers, trends, and icons
2. **Property cards**: Grid shows 6-8 property cards with photos, badges, addresses, and prices
3. **Status badges**: Draft cards show muted badge, generated show warning, published show success
4. **Hover effect**: Hover over property card → shadow lifts (elevated shadow)
5. **Navigation**: Click a published property card → navigates to `/advertentie/[id]`
6. **Responsive grid**: Resize to mobile → grid collapses from 3 columns to 1
7. **Dutch timestamps**: Activity feed shows "2 uur geleden", "gisteren" etc.

### Implementation Notes
- **Do NOT** refactor or restructure existing code beyond what's needed for this issue
- **Do NOT** add error handling, validation, or edge cases not specified in the AC
- **Do NOT** modify files outside the Scope Files list
- **Pattern rationale**: Photo-forward cards match real estate industry standards where the image sells the property
- **Key constraints**: Use placeholder gradients (warm tones) if no real property images are available. Price format: "€ 425.000" (Dutch convention with dots). Dutch relative time formatting (custom, not a library — keep simple).
- **Per-file acceptance**: `dashboard/page.tsx` must compose all sections. `stat-card.tsx` must show number + trend + icon. `property-card.tsx` must be photo-forward with all specified elements. `activity-feed.tsx` must show Dutch timestamps. `use-properties.ts` must export hook with filter capability.

[Shell] Build app shell with sidebar and page header

issues.title: [Features] Build upload and generate page
issues.description:
## Summary
Build the core feature page where brokers upload property photos via drag-and-drop, fill in Dutch property details, and generate an AI advert. The page uses mock AI generation with a realistic 2-3 second loading state, then redirects to the advert editor.

## Current vs Expected Behavior
**Current:** No upload page exists.
**Expected:** `/nieuw` shows a two-column layout with a drag-and-drop image gallery and a Dutch property details form. The generate button triggers a simulated AI generation with loading state, then redirects to `/advertentie/[id]`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Image gallery accepts drag-and-drop and click-to-upload for image files (jpg, png, webp), displays thumbnails in a 3-4 column grid with `--radius-md` corners, shows delete button on hover, and includes a dashed "Meer toevoegen" slot at the end
- [ ] Property form shows all Dutch-labeled fields (Adres, Postcode, Plaats, Vraagprijs with € prefix, Woonoppervlakte with m² suffix, Kamers, Slaapkamers, Badkamers, Bouwjaar, Energielabel dropdown A+++–G) with `--surface-2` background inputs
- [ ] Generate button ("Advertentie genereren") is disabled until at least 1 image is uploaded AND address is filled, shows a spinner + "Advertentie wordt gegenereerd..." during the 2-3 second mock generation, then redirects to `/advertentie/[new-id]`

## Scope
**In scope:** Upload page, image gallery component, property form component, generate button component, generation hook, drag-and-drop, loading states
**Out of scope:** Real image upload to cloud, real AI generation, image cropping/editing, property validation beyond address requirement

## Technical Context

### Files to Modify
| File | Action | What to Change |
|------|--------|----------------|
| `src/app/(app)/nieuw/page.tsx` | Create | Upload page with two-column layout: gallery + form + generate button |
| `src/components/upload/image-gallery.tsx` | Create | Drag-and-drop zone with thumbnail grid |
| `src/components/upload/property-form.tsx` | Create | Property details form with Dutch labels |
| `src/components/upload/generate-button.tsx` | Create | Generate CTA with disabled/loading/complete states |
| `src/hooks/use-generate.ts` | Create | Hook wrapping mock AI generation with loading state |

### Patterns to Follow
- Upload Staging Area pattern from `.interface-design/system.md`: gallery grid, not file list
- `"use client"` for all interactive components (file upload, form state, generation)
- Import `generateAdvert` from `src/lib/mock-ai.ts`
- Import types from `src/lib/types.ts`

### Reusable Utilities
- `src/lib/mock-ai.ts` — `generateAdvert()` function
- `src/lib/types.ts` — `Property`, `Advert`, `Platform`
- `src/lib/utils.ts` — `cn()` for class merging
- `src/components/layout/header.tsx` — page header component from Issue 4
- shadcn/ui components: `Button`, `Input`, `Label`, `Card`, `Textarea`
- `lucide-react` — `Upload`, `X`, `Plus`, `Loader2` icons

### Related Tests
No automated tests for this phase.

### Design Context
- **system.md**: EXISTS at `.interface-design/system.md`
- **Depth strategy**: subtle-shadows
- **Key tokens**: `--surface-2` for input backgrounds, `--border-emphasis` dashed for drop zone, `--brand` for generate button, `--radius-md` for thumbnails, `--space-4` for form gaps
- **Component patterns to match**: Upload Staging Area from system.md

The resolver MUST read `.interface-design/system.md` and implement the Upload Staging Area pattern.

### Implementation Complexity
**Estimate:** M
- 5 files, drag-and-drop interaction, form state management, async generation flow

### Scope Files
**Must modify:** `src/app/(app)/nieuw/page.tsx`, `src/components/upload/image-gallery.tsx`, `src/components/upload/property-form.tsx`, `src/components/upload/generate-button.tsx`, `src/hooks/use-generate.ts`
**Must NOT modify:** `src/lib/mock-ai.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/types.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/mock-data.ts` (Issue 2), `src/components/layout/*` (Issue 4), `src/components/dashboard/*` (Issue 5), `src/components/editor/*` (Issue 7), `src/hooks/use-properties.ts` (Issue 5)

### Required Tools
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__search_items_in_registries` — verify component availability
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__resolve-library-id` — React docs for drag-and-drop
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__query-docs` — query file input and drag-drop patterns
- `gh pr create` — create pull request
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__create_comment` — update issue status

### Test Scenarios
1. **Page renders**: Navigate to `/nieuw` → two-column layout with gallery and form visible
2. **Drag and drop**: Drag an image file onto the drop zone → thumbnail appears in grid
3. **Click upload**: Click drop zone → file picker opens, select image → thumbnail appears
4. **Delete image**: Hover over thumbnail → delete button appears, click → image removed
5. **Form fields**: All 10 fields visible with correct Dutch labels and input types
6. **Generate disabled**: No images uploaded → generate button is disabled
7. **Generate loading**: Upload image + fill address, click generate → spinner shown for 2-3s
8. **Generate redirect**: After generation completes → redirected to `/advertentie/[id]`
9. **Responsive**: Resize to mobile → stacks vertically (gallery on top, form below)

### Implementation Notes
- **Do NOT** refactor or restructure existing code beyond what's needed for this issue
- **Do NOT** add error handling, validation, or edge cases not specified in the AC
- **Do NOT** modify files outside the Scope Files list
- **Pattern rationale**: Native HTML5 drag-and-drop API (no external library) keeps dependencies minimal
- **Key constraints**: Images stored as File objects with `URL.createObjectURL()` for previews. No actual upload — files stay in browser memory. Energielabel dropdown values: A+++, A++, A+, A, B, C, D, E, F, G. Drop zone text: "Sleep foto's hierheen of klik om te uploaden".
- **Per-file acceptance**: `nieuw/page.tsx` must compose gallery + form + button in two-column layout. `image-gallery.tsx` must handle drag-drop + click + delete + add-more slot. `property-form.tsx` must have all 10 fields. `generate-button.tsx` must show 3 states (disabled, loading, ready). `use-generate.ts` must wrap `generateAdvert` with loading/result/error state.

issues.title: [Features] Build advert editor with platform preview
issues.description:
## Summary
Build the signature advert editor page with a split-view layout: editable content on the left, platform-specific preview on the right. The preview transforms to match Funda, Pararius, or Jaap styling when switching tabs, giving brokers a live view of how their advert will appear to buyers. This is the signature element of the application.

## Current vs Expected Behavior
**Current:** No editor page exists.
**Expected:** `/advertentie/[id]` shows a split-view with an editable advert (title, description, features list, property details) on the left and a platform-specific preview on the right. Editing syncs to the preview in real-time. Platform tabs switch the preview styling between Funda, Pararius, and Jaap. Export actions allow copying, downloading, and marking as published.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Split-view renders correctly with editable title (text input), description (textarea), features (editable bullet list with add/remove), and read-only property details on the left — all changes update the platform preview on the right in real-time
- [ ] Platform tabs (Funda, Pararius, Jaap) switch the preview panel's visual styling: Funda uses blue header with photo area and features sidebar, Pararius uses green accents with different layout, Jaap uses a simpler layout — each is visually distinct
- [ ] Export actions work: "Kopieer tekst" copies formatted text to clipboard with confirmation, "Download" saves a .txt file, "Markeer als gepubliceerd" updates status — responsive layout stacks vertically on mobile with toggle between edit/preview modes

## Scope
**In scope:** Editor page, advert editor panel, platform preview panel, platform tabs, export actions, real-time sync, responsive stacking
**Out of scope:** Rich text editing (plain text/textarea only), image editing, real platform API integration, undo/redo, autosave

## Technical Context

### Files to Modify
| File | Action | What to Change |
|------|--------|----------------|
| `src/app/(app)/advertentie/[id]/page.tsx` | Create | Editor page with split-view layout, header, back link |
| `src/components/editor/advert-editor.tsx` | Create | Left panel: editable title, description, features, property details |
| `src/components/editor/platform-preview.tsx` | Create | Right panel: platform-specific styled preview (Funda, Pararius, Jaap) |
| `src/components/editor/platform-tabs.tsx` | Create | Tab bar for switching between platform previews |
| `src/components/editor/export-actions.tsx` | Create | Copy, download, and publish actions |

### Patterns to Follow
- Platform Preview (Signature Element) pattern from `.interface-design/system.md`
- `"use client"` for all components (editor state, real-time sync, clipboard API)
- Import mock advert data from `src/lib/mock-data.ts`
- Import types from `src/lib/types.ts`
- Use `useProperties` hook from `src/hooks/use-properties.ts` for property data

### Reusable Utilities
- `src/lib/mock-data.ts` — `mockAdverts` for pre-generated content
- `src/lib/types.ts` — `Advert`, `Property`, `Platform`
- `src/hooks/use-properties.ts` — get property by ID
- `src/lib/utils.ts` — `cn()` for class merging
- `src/components/layout/header.tsx` — page header component from Issue 4
- shadcn/ui components: `Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent`, `Button`, `Input`, `Textarea`, `Card`, `Badge`
- `lucide-react` — `Copy`, `Download`, `Check`, `ArrowLeft`, `Plus`, `X` icons

### Related Tests
No automated tests for this phase.

### Design Context
- **system.md**: EXISTS at `.interface-design/system.md`
- **Depth strategy**: subtle-shadows
- **Key tokens**: `--brand` for active tab indicator, `--surface-1` for editor/preview panels, `--border` for split separator, card and elevated shadows
- **Component patterns to match**: Platform Preview (Signature Element) from system.md — split view, tab bar, real-time sync, responsive stacking with edit/preview toggle

The resolver MUST read `.interface-design/system.md` and implement the Platform Preview pattern with particular care — this is the signature element.

### Implementation Complexity
**Estimate:** M
- 5 files, real-time state sync, 3 distinct platform preview layouts, clipboard/download APIs

### Scope Files
**Must modify:** `src/app/(app)/advertentie/[id]/page.tsx`, `src/components/editor/advert-editor.tsx`, `src/components/editor/platform-preview.tsx`, `src/components/editor/platform-tabs.tsx`, `src/components/editor/export-actions.tsx`
**Must NOT modify:** `src/lib/mock-data.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/types.ts` (Issue 2), `src/lib/mock-ai.ts` (Issue 2), `src/components/layout/*` (Issue 4), `src/components/dashboard/*` (Issue 5), `src/components/upload/*` (Issue 6), `src/hooks/*` (Issues 5, 6)

### Required Tools
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_shadcn__search_items_in_registries` — verify Tabs, Card components
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__resolve-library-id` — Next.js dynamic routes docs
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_context7__query-docs` — query App Router dynamic route params
- `gh pr create` — create pull request
- `mcp__plugin_sero-workflow_linear__create_comment` — update issue status

### Test Scenarios
1. **Page renders**: Navigate to `/advertentie/[id]` → split view with editor and preview visible
2. **Edit title**: Change title in editor → preview title updates immediately
3. **Edit description**: Change description textarea → preview description updates immediately
4. **Edit features**: Add a feature bullet → it appears in preview; remove one → it disappears
5. **Funda preview**: Select Funda tab → preview shows blue-themed layout with features sidebar
6. **Pararius preview**: Select Pararius tab → preview shows green-accented layout
7. **Jaap preview**: Select Jaap tab → preview shows simpler layout
8. **Copy to clipboard**: Click "Kopieer tekst" → text copied, confirmation shown
9. **Download**: Click "Download" → .txt file downloads with formatted advert
10. **Publish**: Click "Markeer als gepubliceerd" → status badge updates to published
11. **Responsive**: Resize to mobile → stacks vertically with edit/preview toggle

### Implementation Notes
- **Do NOT** refactor or restructure existing code beyond what's needed for this issue
- **Do NOT** add error handling, validation, or edge cases not specified in the AC
- **Do NOT** modify files outside the Scope Files list
- **Pattern rationale**: Split-view with real-time sync is the core value proposition — broker sees buyer's perspective instantly
- **Key constraints**: Platform previews are approximations, not pixel-perfect copies. Funda: blue header (#004B8C approx), photo area, description, features sidebar. Pararius: green accents (#00A651 approx), different column layout. Jaap: simpler single-column. Use `navigator.clipboard.writeText()` for copy. Use `Blob` + `URL.createObjectURL` + `<a download>` for file download.
- **Line references**: Study Platform Preview pattern in `.interface-design/system.md` lines 134-139
- **Per-file acceptance**: `[id]/page.tsx` must render split-view with header and back link. `advert-editor.tsx` must have 4 editable sections. `platform-preview.tsx` must render 3 distinct platform layouts. `platform-tabs.tsx` must switch active platform. `export-actions.tsx` must implement copy, download, and publish.
